cooperates.cooperate_desc: Cici's ultimate binds two enemies, allowing Gatotkaca to reliably follow up with his ultimate, significantly increasing its hit consistency.

counters.counter_desc: Gatotkaca can counter Layla easily because Layla has no mobility and relies entirely on positioning and range to deal damage. Gatotkaca can approach through bush control and directly lock her down with Skill 2, preventing her from repositioning or kiting. In addition, Layla's damage is primarily physical, which is heavily mitigated by Gatotkaca's passive that increases Physical Defense as his HP drops. Once Gatotkaca reaches her with his ultimate or crowd control, Layla has very limited counterplay and is often forced to use Flicker or gets eliminated immediately

dominants.dominant_desc: Control bushes, protect mid and jungle cores, and use Skill 2 to punish early dives or force enemy Flickers.
Play as a counter-engage roamer by controlling vision, punishing enemy mispositioning, and following up team initiations with well-timed ultimates.
Act as a frontline anchor by absorbing damage, peeling for your backline, and controlling space during decisive team fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: For emblems, Gatotkaca should use the full Tank emblem setup. However, the first talent slot can be adjusted: Firmness is recommended if the enemy team does not deal true damage, while Agility can be taken if the enemy lineup has high mobility or fast movement speed.

equips.equip_desc: This setup is recommended against attack speed-based heroes with strong lifesteal and tanks that have high sustain or regeneration
This setup is recommended when facing true damage heroes.

hero.hero_overview: Gatotkaca is a highly versatile roaming hero suitable for most draft situations. He is particularly effective against assassins and fighters, and excels at bush control and surprise pick-offs.
hero.hero_strength: Gatotkaca is particularly strong against physical damage oriented heroes. His passive grants increasing Physical Defense as his HP decreases, making him exceptionally hard to take down during extended team fights.
hero.hero_weakness: Gatotkaca struggles against magic burst and true damage. While magic damage can be addressed through proper Magic Defense itemization, true damage is significantly harder for him to handle. Therefore, banning high true-damage heroes like Karrie and Lesley is advisable when drafting Gatotkaca.

data.recommend: Gatotkaca is highly recommended as a roamer against physical-heavy lineups, where he excels at absorbing damage, countering dives, and controlling team fights.

spell.spell_desc: Using the Revitalize battle spell is highly effective for long, extended team fights, as it provides strong area healing that can also support teammates. An alternative option is Vengeance, but this changes Gatotkaca's playstyle. When using Vengeance, the gameplay focuses more on directly targeting the enemy backline. However, Vengeance can be easily countered through kiting, since enemies can simply keep their distance and avoid attacking Gatotkaca while the spell is active. As a result, Vengeance is generally less effective than Revitalize for Gatotkaca.

data.title: Mustafa Mahmoud guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Having both Atlas and Gatotkaca on the same team (usually as Roamer and EXP Laner) results in one of the most terrifying, unescapable Crowd Control (CC) Duos in the game.

counters.counter_desc:
Karrie (Marksman)	True Damage Shredder	Reason: Karrie's passive ability deals True Damage based on the target's HP, which completely ignores Gatotkaca's high Physical Defense armor. She melts him faster than almost any other Marksman, no matter how tanky he builds.
Lunox (Mage)	Magic Burst Damage	Reason: Gatotkaca's Passive only boosts his Physical Defense, leaving him weak to Magic Damage. Lunox has high Magic Penetration and burst, allowing her to quickly kill Gatotkaca without him being able to fully use his physical tankiness.
Diggie (Support)	Crowd Control Negation	Reason: Diggie's Ultimate (Time Journey) instantly gives all nearby allies CC Immunity. If Diggie times this correctly, he will completely cancel Gatotkaca's Ultimate (the knock-up) and his Taunt, making Gatotkaca's entire initiation attempt useless.
Valir (Mage)	Knockback/Kiting	Reason: Valir can use his Skill 2 to immediately push Gatotkaca away when he tries to get close. He can also use his Ultimate to cleanse himself of any slow or initial stun, making it impossible for Gatotkaca to land his charging Taunt.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Be a Physical Wall: His best job is to stand in front of your team against enemy Fighters and Marksmen. They will barely hurt you.

Ultimate is for Follow-Up: NEVER jump with your Ultimate first. Wait for enemies to be busy fighting your team, then jump on their most dangerous backline heroes (Mages/Marksmen).

Taunt to Save: Use your Skill 2 (the dash/shout) to save a teammate. If an enemy Assassin jumps your carry, use the Taunt to instantly make the enemy attack you instead.

Punch to Heal: Keep an eye on his Passive. When the glow appears, make sure you land that next basic attack—it's your free heal!

Magic Damage is Your Friend: You deal Magic Damage, so even when you build full defense, you still hurt squishy enemies a lot!

emblems.emblem_desc: The best tanky emblem for Gatotkaca is the Tank Emblem with the Tenacity (for defense)
The best Custom Mage Emblem setup for a damage-focused Gatotkaca

equips.equip_title: Best Damage-Tank Hybrid Items for Gatotkaca

hero.hero_overview: Gatotkaca is a Tank/Fighter hero in Mobile Legends, known for being super tough 😁
hero.hero_strength:
Gatotkaca's main strengths are:

Anti-Physical Tank: Extremely high Physical Defense, especially when his health is low, making him a great counter to Marksmen and Physical Fighters.

Powerful Crowd Control (CC): Excellent team-fight initiation with his long-range Ultimate (Knock-up) and Skill 2 (Taunt).

Self-Sustain: His passive allows him to heal himself, letting him survive long, drawn-out battles.

Disruption: He can jump into the enemy backline and completely break their team's positioning.
hero.hero_weakness:
Gatotkaca's main weaknesses are:

Magic Damage: His passive only gives him armor against physical attacks, so magic heroes (Mages) melt him easily.

True Damage: Heroes with True Damage (like Karrie or X.Borg) ignore all of his armor, making him less tanky.

Cancellable Skills: His Skill 2 (Taunt) can be easily interrupted while he is charging it.

Slow Ultimate: Enemies can usually walk out of the target area of his ultimate before he lands.

Anti-Heal: Items that reduce healing (like Dominance Ice) greatly weaken his self-sustain

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on Gatotkaca role as a durable initiator. Warrior/Tough Boots give early defense. Dominance Ice reduces enemy regen and attack speed. Oracle and AthenaShield increase his magic durability and boost sustain. Cursed Helmet enhances his area damage in team fights. Immortality provides a second chance in late game clashes, while Antique Cuirass helps reduce enemy burst damage

hero.hero_overview:
Even when equipped with defensive items, this hero remains a formidable force, capable of swiftly dispatching foes with just a few basic attacks, thanks to his passive ability, bolsters his basic attacks with each blow he endures. Additionally, Gatotkaca boasts a taunting ability with Unbreakable, adding another layer of control to his arsenal.

Yet, the highlight of his kit is undoubtedly his ultimate, Avatar of the Guardian. With this ability, Gatotkaca leaps to a designated location, unleashing a devastating knock-up effect upon any enemies caught in the explosion radius.

While Gatotkaca offers versatility, mastering him at higher ranks requires some dedication. Fortunately.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: For me, I rate the hero Gatot Kaka as one of the best heroes currently in the Path of Warriors because he is a hero who excels in many things, such as control, endurance, causing damage, and also protection.

counters.counter_desc: The alpha is considered the real anti-hero, Gatot, because of his special damage. Also, the heroine, Carrie, and the heroine, Leslie, have real damage. Also, the hero, Dayrut, due to his normal character penetration. Also, the hero, Thamoz.

emblems.emblem_desc: These features are considered the best features for the hero because both the first and second features increase his physical and magical defense, or the third feature helps him cause fairly good damage to enemies and also helps him clean the roads quickly at the beginning and even in the middle of the match.

equips.equip_desc: This equipment is considered the best equipment for the hero Gatot Kaka with the Thunder Belt, which helps him participate more in team fights and also absorbs the damage resulting from his Basif contributions, as well as the Immortality Equipment, which helps him in self-defense and also has a greater chance of participating in team fights.

hero.hero_overview: The hero, Gatot Kaka, is considered one of the strongest warrior heroes currently. He is in the meta, and his ban rate in league tournaments is very high due to his high endurance and exceptional damage using his basif.
hero.hero_strength: The strength of the hero Gatot Kaka lies in team battles and his Basif, which makes him withstand high damage and cause damage at the same time. Every time he collects the accumulations of the power bar, he will improve the normal strike, which causes high damage to heroes with low life points, and at the same time he regains a percentage of his life points. The Thunder Belt is considered one of the most important equipment for the hero because it helps him a lot in improving his normal attack, as well as increasing his physical and magical defense.
hero.hero_weakness: One of the hero's weaknesses is that he is weak at the beginning of the match, especially if the opposing team has heroes whose damage depends on the beginning of the match, such as Yuzong, Khaled, Dayruth, Alpha, and so on.

data.recommend: The best advice for the hero Gatot Kaka

spell.spell_desc: The Healer Lake feature is considered the best thing for the hero Gatot Kaka because it helps him withstand more in team fights and also helps his allies.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Gatotkaca gains [1] Physical Defense equal to 2% of his lost HP (up to 100). For every 300 damage he takes (calculated before damage reduction), he gains 5 Rage (up to 100).
Upon reaching over 25 Rage, Gatotkaca's next Basic Attack becomes enhanced, consuming all Rage to deal extra Magic Damage and recover. The extra damage scales with his Rage, level, and Magic Power.

hero.hero_overview: Gatotkaca adalah hero tank yang dikenal dengan ketahanannya yang luar biasa dan kemampuan crowd control area yang kuat. Ia sering digunakan sebagai inisiator dalam pertarungan tim dan pelindung bagi rekan setimnya. Dengan skill Avatar of Guardian, Gatotkaca dapat melompat ke tengah musuh, menciptakan momen pertarungan yang menguntungkan. Rute permainannya biasanya fokus pada roaming untuk membantu lane dan mengganggu hero core lawan.
hero.hero_strength:
Durabilitas Tinggi: Gatotkaca dapat menyerap banyak damage berkat pertahanan dan skill pasifnya.

Crowd Control Area: Skill ultimate-nya efektif untuk mengunci pergerakan banyak musuh sekaligus.

Inisiator Andal: Sangat cocok membuka pertarungan tim dan memaksa musuh untuk mundur.

Cocok Melawan Hero Tipis: Hero-hero dengan HP rendah akan kesulitan menghadapi Gatotkaca di pertarungan.
hero.hero_weakness:
Bergantung pada Ultimate: Tanpa skill ultimate, Gatotkaca kehilangan potensi inisiasinya.

Mobilitas Terbatas: Selain skill lompatnya, Gatotkaca cenderung lambat dalam rotasi.

Rentan terhadap Crowd Control: Meski tanky, ia tetap bisa dikendalikan dengan efek CC musuh.

Damage Terbatas: Sulit memberikan tekanan solo kill tanpa bantuan rekan tim.

data.recommend: Main bareng temen mainnya agresif rusuh

spell.spell_desc:
Meningkatkan Ketahanan: Memberikan pemulihan HP tambahan untuk dirinya dan rekan setim di area efek, membuatnya lebih tahan lama di garis depan.

Mendukung Tim Saat War: Spell ini membantu rekan setim bertahan lebih lama saat team fight berlangsung, terutama saat mereka berkumpul di sekitar Gatotkaca.

Sinergi dengan Skill Pasif: Dengan HP yang lebih banyak berkat penyembuhan dari Revitalize, Gatotkaca bisa memanfaatkan pasifnya (Steel Bones) untuk menghasilkan damage tambahan lebih sering.

Memaksimalkan Inisiasi: Setelah melompat ke dalam formasi musuh, Revitalize bisa langsung diaktifkan untuk memberikan sustain yang dibutuhkan sampai backup tim datang.
